intent: Fix the cloud_gallery production build, harden its lint to the most aggressive type-checked ruleset, reach 100% test coverage, deploy the SPA live, and whitelist+install the dufs_client mobile app so focus mode does not kill it.
scope: cloud_gallery/ React SPA (source, tests, eslint/vite/package config)
Non-goal: no changes to KeePass sync or media-sync scripts
changes: dufs-client.test.ts: typed the fetch mocks as vi.fn<typeof fetch>() so mock.calls carry the real [input, init?] tuple — removed the empty-tuple/undefined-cast TS2493/TS2352 build errors.
dufs-client.ts: made request() take an explicit method arg, deleting the unreachable `?? "GET"` default branch.

gallery.tsx/grid.tsx: replaced the nullable viewer index with a -1 sentinel and pass the media entry (not an index) so three unreachable defensive guards disappear; onOpenMedia signature changed to (entry) => void.
use-hash-path.ts: extracted serverPath() so the SSR snapshot is testable.

eslint.config.js: strict + stylistic type-checked presets, react-hooks, reportUnusedDisableDirectives:error, test-file unbound-method override; dropped eslint-plugin-react (incompatible with ESLint 10).
Added grid.test.tsx and use-listing.test.ts; extended existing suites — coverage thresholds raised to 100/100/100/100.
Deployed via setup_cloud_gallery.sh (render-spa live), fixed ffmpeg by renaming a stale /usr/local/bin/ffmpeg shadow that linked the removed libvpx.so.11, regenerated thumbnails (10 made, 0 failed).

verification.evidence: 62 tests passed; Statements 100% Branches 100% Functions 100% Lines 100%
dufs render-spa live on :5000, returns 401 unauthenticated (up + auth-protected); index.html references built assets; 10 thumbnails on disk

verification.command: adb -s BL9000EEA0000102 install -r app-debug.apk; monkey launch
verification.evidence: Success; pidof com.kuhy.dufs_client RUNNING 4s after launch (not killed by focus daemon)

risks: render-spa restart briefly interrupts the live dufs service (KeePass file GET/PUT/?hash unaffected).
The renamed /usr/local/bin/ffmpeg.broken-libvpx11.bak shadow — if any workflow relied on that static build, it now resolves to the pacman ffmpeg instead.
rollback: git revert this commit and re-run setup_cloud_gallery.sh to redeploy the prior SPA; remove com.kuhy.dufs_client from WHITELIST and redeploy focus mode.
Restore ffmpeg shadow: sudo mv /usr/local/bin/ffmpeg.broken-libvpx11.bak /usr/local/bin/ffmpeg (not recommended — it is broken).
